title: Halifax, Nova Scotia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Halifax, Nova Scotia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Halifax is a city in Nova Scotia with a population of 465,703. Atlantic Canada’s largest city with a historic waterfront, growing tech sector, and a relaxed coastal lifestyle.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
